name: repowise
description: Code health, architecture, and git intelligence from one local index, in your editor and in your AI agent via MCP.

untrustedWorkspaces.description: Repowise runs the local repowise CLI and connects to a local analysis server, so it is enabled only in trusted workspaces.

repowise.server.port.markdownDescription: Port the local Repowise server listens on. Leave empty to discover it from the running server's lockfile.

enumDescriptions: Ask before starting the local server.
Start the local server automatically when a Repowise index is present.
Never start the local server automatically.
repowise.server.autoStart.description: Whether to start the local Repowise server automatically.

repowise.cliPath.description: Absolute path to the repowise CLI executable. Leave empty to use 'repowise' from your PATH.

viewsWelcome.contents:
Repowise is disabled in untrusted workspaces because it runs a local CLI and connects to a local server.

[Manage Workspace Trust](command:workbench.trust.manage)

The repowise CLI was not found on your PATH.

Install it, then set it up for this repository.

[Check Setup](command:repowise.checkSetup)

If the CLI lives at a custom location, set `repowise.cliPath` in settings.

This repository is not indexed yet.

Set up Repowise to build the index and unlock codebase intelligence.

[Set Up This Repository](command:repowise.runInit)

The local Repowise server is not running.

Start it to browse the index and connect your AI agent.

[Start Server](command:repowise.startServer)
[Check Setup](command:repowise.checkSetup)

walkthroughs.title: Get Started with Repowise
walkthroughs.description: Index your repository and connect it to your editor and AI agent.

steps.title: Install the CLI
steps.description:
Install the repowise command line tool so the extension can index and serve your repository.
[Check Setup](command:repowise.checkSetup)

steps.title: Index the repository
steps.description:
Build the Repowise index for this workspace.
[Set Up This Repository](command:repowise.runInit)

steps.title: Connect the server
steps.description:
Start the local server so the extension can read your index.
[Start Server](command:repowise.startServer)

steps.title: MCP for your AI agent
steps.description:
Expose the Repowise tools to your AI agent over MCP.
[Configure MCP for this Workspace](command:repowise.configureMcp)
